subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-10-02 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: I consider him [Tolstoi] a Bahá'í, a real Bahá'í, because he lived and acted in accord with the good-pleasure of Bahá'u'lláh
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @review of publications, @wealth inequality and its moderation
